rationale: The proposed change concerns the Tax Code residence homestead exemption amount. Educ. Code §37.005 governs student suspension and has no bearing on homestead exemption or appraisal values.
quote: Sec. 37.005. SUSPENSION. (a) The principal or other appropriate administrator may suspend a student who engages in conduct identified in the student code of conduct adopted under Section 37.001 as conduct for which a student may be subject to an in-school or out-of-school suspension.
_note: No conflict. The rule_text (student suspension) is unrelated to the proposed change (homestead exemption increase).
